title: michelia neocaledonica
intro: Michelia neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonian magnolia, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. It is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Magnoliaceae, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Michelia neocaledonica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
